import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import { Coins, TrendingUp, Clock, ShieldCheck, ArrowUpRight, Zap, Plus } from 'lucide-react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; export default function Dashboard() { const navigate = useNavigate(); const [myListings, setMyListings] = useState([]); // Load the listings you created from LocalStorage useEffect(() => { const saved = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('myListings')) || []; setMyListings(saved); }, []); return ( {/* HEADER SECTION */}

Dashboard

Welcome back, Arjun! Here is your barter summary.

{/* TOP STAT CARDS (The Original Structure) */}
{/* Main Balance Card */}

Available Balance

1,450 WTK

+12% from last month
{/* Trust Score Card */}

Trust Rating

4.9/5.0

Top 5% of Kochi Community

{/* Active Trades Card */}

Active Barters

08

3 pending approval

{/* NEW SECTION: YOUR ADDED LISTINGS */}

My New Listings

{myListings.length} Items
{myListings.length > 0 ? ( myListings.map((item) => (

{item.wtk} WTK

{item.title}

{item.location} • {item.type}

 )) ) : (

You haven't created any listings yet.

)}
{/* ORIGINAL RECENT ACTIVITY SECTION */}

Recent Activity

{[ { user: "Sarah J.", action: "accepted your trade", item: "Professional Camera", time: "2h ago", val: "+450" }, { user: "Rahul K.", action: "sent a message regarding", item: "Python Tutoring", time: "5h ago", val: "INFO" }, ].map((activity, i) => (
{activity.user[0]}

{activity.user} {activity.action}

{activity.item}

{activity.val}

{activity.time}

))}
); }
